sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (id UInt32, start_date Date, interval IntervalYear) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_intervals VALUES (1, toDate('2024-01-01'), toIntervalYear(5));
SELECT id, start_date + interval AS new_date FROM test_intervals WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_intervals SET interval = toIntervalYear(10) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, start_date, interval, start_date + interval AS result_date FROM test_intervals;
